REMITTITUR FILED WE FIND THAT THE MUNICIPAL COURT LACKED JURISDICTION AB INITIO. ACCORDINGLY, WE VACATE THE JUDGMENT AND REMAND THE ACTION TO THE TRIAL COURT WITH INSTRUCTIONS THAT IT TRANSFER IT TO A SUPERIOR COURT HAVING JURISDICTION OVER THE SUBJECT MATTER. PURSUANT TO RULE OF COURT 135(B), COSTS ON APPEAR ARE AWARDED TO APPELLANT. (SEE REMITTITUR FOR DETAILS)

IT IS ALSO ADJUDGED THAT CROSS COMPLAINANTS JOSE ANTONIO RAYA & DOLORES RAYA RECOVER FROM CROSS DEFENDANT RODOLFO VELASQUEZ ON THE CROSS COMPLAINT THE SUM OF $25,000.00 PRINCIPAL, INTEREST (10% POST JUDGMENT).
